{{! ------------------------------------------------}} {{! Carousel}} {{! ------------------------------------------------}}
{{! Carousel main images}}
{{#if (isdefined this.image)}}
{{#each this.image}} {{#if @first}}
{{else}}
{{/if}} {{/each}}
{{/if}}
{{! Carousel thumbnails images}} {{#if (isdefined this.image)}}
{{#each this.image}}
{{#if @first}} {{else}} {{/if}}
{{/each}}
{{/if}}
